content:
You should wait and upgrade using the play store version when it becomes available.

It's not unusual for F-droid to notify you about about the update. Their store is usually a little quicker at making updates available to users compared with google play.

You can't use F-droid to upgrade a version from the play store and vice versa. It will fail if you attempt it. Each store signs the app with a different key.
creator: platform34
